Intraday post (27/May)

Here you can find the weekly post. I addet sections to it, pls re-check it.

Coding intraday positioning:

Speed profile is net positive, locally it is heavily negative above 5900, charm and net gamma are also negative. Coding centroid in the 5851.27 - 5867.10 zone. Momentum will break through only if vol calms down locally towards 5853.And downside speed is very steep. Position-wise we should see vol catching up to the downside at 5826.83 and below. If it doesn’t, customers don’t buy the downside, and it will reject the price. If it does, I code 5800 as the zero vanna that is expected to hold the market. If this lvl would break bcs momenumt would start to titter-totter in the 5826 - 5800 range, I code 5756 as braking point (but we should feel some braking effect 10 pts above)5900 is a big gamma bar, if vol doesn’t calm down, it will reject it. Well speed profile implies 5923.63 the line where vol can be expected to catch up to the upside due to the local negative speed. Coding 5940 as max, it is a local vanna flip lvl, low vol would need to break through it.Also coding 5872 as an important local pivot into 1.30PM (projecting charm and color). Vol selling is expected and ranging. Yields short-end buybacks cap yields → volatility drifts lower. Vol spike is expected to catch up into Thrusday.

OptionsDepth Heatmap:

(Description is here)
